false_positive_declarations.mechanism: _known_false_positives.yaml (plugin root), consumed by check_visual_clash --ignore-known-fp; six fixture-scoped + glyph-scoped patterns added (ids fig1_panelA_title_polymer_name_frame_halo, fig1_panelC_hero_tag_frame_halo, fig1_panelE_letter_e_frame_halo, fig1_panelF_letter_f_frame_halo, fig1_panelE_title_ispd_frame_halo, fig1_panelE_vs_meter_label_box_border)
false_positive_declarations.note: each pattern carries a ground field; bounds are tight (just above each measured signal) so real defects and future stronger collisions on these glyphs stay actionable
